zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Radcliffe於1425年出生在英國藍卡爾查阿德頓時，她的父親Richard de Radcliffe32歲，母親Margaret de Chadderton31歲。她和Ralph Standish至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1476年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Radcliffe于1425年出生在英国藍卡爾查阿德頓时，她的父亲Richard de Radcliffe32岁，母亲Margaret de Chadderton31岁。她和Ralph Standish至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1476年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Radcliffe was born in 1425, in Chadderton, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard de Radcliffe, was 32 and her mother, Margaret de Chadderton, was 31. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Ralph Standish. She died in 1476, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Radcliffe est née en 1425, à Chadderton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Radcliffe, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Chadderton, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Ralph Standish. Elle est décédée en 1476, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Radcliffe 1425 in Chadderton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Radcliffe 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Chadderton 31. Sie hatte mit Ralph Standish mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Radcliffe è nata il nel 1425 nel Chadderton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard de Radcliffe, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Chadderton, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Ralph Standish. Morì nel 1476, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Radcliffeが1425年にイギリスランカシュアイアチャッドエルトンで生まれた時，父Richard de Radcliffeは32歳，母Margaret de Chaddertonは31歳であった。彼女はRalph Standishとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1476年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Radcliffe(이)가 1425년 영국 랭카실르 채더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Radcliffe(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Chadderton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Standish(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Radcliffe nasceu em 1425, em Chadderton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Radcliffe, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Chadderton, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Ralph Standish. Ela faleceu em 1476, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Radcliffe родилась в 1425 г. в местности чэддиртон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Radcliffe было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Chadderton, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Ralph Standish. Она умерла в 1476 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Radcliffe nació en 1425, en Chadderton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Radcliffe, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret de Chadderton, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Ralph Standish. Murió en 1476, a la edad de 51 años.
